titleStmt.title: SII 5.419: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 419. (A.R. No. 130 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhu vaṉaccakkaravatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ kiḻvempunāṭṭut tirunelveliuṭaiyār(t) tirunelveli
uṭaiyārkoyil patipātamulapaṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriya tevakaṉmikaḷukku Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyārkku va
ṭaveḷḷāṟāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyavaḷanāṭṭuk � kūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyāṉ cuntarattoḷuṭaiyāṉāṉa cuntara
pāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉ Ittirunelvelit teṉpāl Iṭaiccapokkil cevitta tirunantavaṉañceyyum peṟku ji
vaṉam Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku Ivvūr patiyilār nilattukku nilaimaiyaḻakiyāṉ taṉpaṅkil tirunantavaṉappuṟamākak kuṭu
tta Ēṟucevakaṉkālppokkil taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Araimā varaikkāṇiyum Ivaṉ paṅkil cāraṟkkālpokkiltaṭi Iraṇṭum nila
m mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum cotiyāṇṭi paṅkil puḷiyoṭukālppokkal vaṇṇālcey taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam Iraṇṭumāvum
(iraṇṭumāvum) māṟāccerikkālpokkil vaṭṭacce nilam Orumāvum nāṇaṟkālppokkil nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum
Āka nilam nālumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum muṉṉuṭaiyārait tavintukārāṇmai miyāṭciyum kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum
viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikra happeṟum vācaṟpeṟum Ilā
ñciṉaippeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭap patiṉañcāvati ṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal tirunantavaṉappuṟa
iṟaiyiliyākat tantom Ippaṭikku nam Olai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirāditya vaṟ celvatākak kallilum(ñ) cem
pilum veṭṭuvittukoḷka Ivai Arumpoṟkūṟṟattup putupperkkuḷattāḻvāṉ Āṇṭapirā ṉaḻakaṉāṉa Aḻakiyapāṇṭiya
viḻupparaiya ṉeḻuttu yāṇṭu 10 5 ḷ 4 100 2 10 5 Ivai Aṇṭanāṭṭup perumaṇalūr Araiyaṉ muṭivaḻaṅkum perumāṉāṉa vikkirama
pāṇṭiya Uttaramattari Eḻuttu Ivai cevvirukkaināṭṭuc cakkaramāṇinalalūr Araiyaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarāya ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.419 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
